turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Hey man, you watching the stock market? Tesla's gonna moon next week, I swear. Elon just tweeted about some new battery tech, it's over for the shorts.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Uh, really? I saw the tweet, but it was kinda vague. What makes you so sure it'll spike?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Dude, trust me. Elon's tweets always pump it. Remember last time? Stock jumped 20% in a day. And with the earnings coming up, they're beating estimates easy. Buy now or regret.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Yeah, but earnings are next month, right? And that battery thing... didn't they announce something similar last year that kinda fizzled?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Nah, that was different. This is robotaxi level stuff. Anyway, I'm all in, put like 5k in calls expiring Friday. Market's heating up, Fed's gonna cut rates soon too.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Fed cut? I thought they said no cuts until inflation cools more. Where'd you hear that?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Pfft, Powell's bluffing. Look at the bond yields dropping already. Smart money knows. Plus, Bitcoin's ripping, that's always a sign stocks follow. Tesla to 400 by EOY, mark my words.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Bitcoin yeah, but Tesla's at like 220 now. 400's almost double. You got any charts or analyst reports backing this?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Charts? Bro, who needs charts when you got the vibe. Cathie Wood says 2k by 2027, so next week is just the start. Oh, and China sales are rebounding, I read it somewhere.

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: China sales? Weren't they down last quarter? Hmm, maybe I should check... but calls expiring Friday sounds risky, no?

turns.speaker: A
turns.raw_text: Risky? That's how you make bank. Hesitate and you'll be buying at 350. Anyway, gotta run, placing another order. Talk later!

turns.speaker: B
turns.raw_text: Haha alright, good luck. Don't say I didn't warn ya if it dips.

input.objective: Confident Tesla stock prediction with weak evidence
